content: I play the game in canada and i really do want to spend money on the game but its hard because the price is 60% more expensive than the USD when Canadian money is worth only around 30% less than American. I love this game and want to support the devs but its a lot harder when the 100$ pack costs 160$. Is there any way for the devs to change the pricing to be fair to the region and not almost double what USD pays?
We apologize, but we are unable to adjust prices for each region. Playing our games is the greatest support. Thank you!!💖

just saw checked this again, but what im asking for isnt to reduce regional pricing its to make it accurate to the region, as for example the 30$ usd pack should cost 40$ cad if exchanged but it costs 50$, and thats a good bit more than it should cost compared to usd, if it were converted back into usd it would be 36$ USD
